THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSORIO, TERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY $846.83 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $846.83, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT HER SLIP AND FALL WAS CAUSED BY THE NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
